title: Sample Page
content:
This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

title: 7 Day Ball Mastery Challenge
content:
Take the 7-Day
Ball Mastery Challenge!

  • 7 free training sessions delivered daily
  • 10 minute workouts that will transform your game
  • Fun games and challenges included

What's Included

Day 1

1,000 Touch Ball Mastery

Start Day 1 by getting over 1,000 quality touches in less than five minutes. Ball Mastery is an essential building block for all soccer players. Join today and receive a 1,000 touch workout that is specifically designed to have your manipulate the ball and change direction.
Learn More
Day 2

Two-Footed Juggle Master

Great players master the ball in the air with all parts of their feet and bodies. Anytime Soccer Training features a juggling curriculum that will take you from a juggling record of one to 1,000. It's all step-by-step and starts with the basics.
Watch More
Day 3

Line Cone Dribble Master

We assembled over 100 line cone drills so that you don't have to. Not only does each drill have it's own video, but each foot also has its own special video. Master these drills and you will blow by multiple defenders in no time.
Watch More
Day 4

1v1 Against Friends

Now it's time to apply the skills you learned in 1v1 games against your teammates, parents and friends. Anytime Soccer Training includes nearly 100 1v1 games that challenges each player to apply the skills they learned in a fun environment.
Watch More
Day 5

Two Cone Ball Mastery

The perfect drills to do at home. The Two Cone Ball Mastery Series has hundreds of drills that require little space and only two cones. Improve your first touch, ball control, quickness and lateral movement over the course of nearly 100 training videos.
Watch More
Day 6

First Touch Rebounder

Rebounder drills are essential for improving first touch, passing accuracy and reaction time. The First Touch Rebounder Series have over 101 videos that develop these skills in both feet.
Watch More
Day 7

Super Fun Soccer Games

All kids love racing, tagging, chasing and playing 1v1 and rewards. Anytime Soccer Training combines fun skill-based soccer games with professional training to motivate your child to stay active and train even more.
Watch More

title: Getting Started with Anytime Soccer Training
content:
Welcome to Anytime Soccer Training! ⚽

We're excited to have you on board. Let's get you set up in just a few minutes.

Follow the 3 steps below in order — and you'll be ready to train!
1

✅ Create Your Account & Verify Email

  1. Go to anytime-soccer.com
  2. Click "Join for Free" and fill out the form
  3. Apply your team code during signup (check your email from your coach)
  4. Open the Welcome Email from us (check spam too!)
  5. Click the "Verify Address" button
  6. Log in using Single Sign-On with your email and password
📺 Watch: Creating an Account
2

👤 Add Your Player Profile(s)

  1. Add one profile for each child who will use the program (max 4)
  2. You can use the same contact email for all profiles
  3. Parents: Only create profiles for your children
  4. Coaches: Create profiles for yourself and your own children only
Important: Coaches do not create profiles for other players on the team.
📺 Watch: How to Add a Profile
3

⚽ Request to Join Your Team

  1. Log in and click Login next to your player's profile
  2. From the dashboard, go to MY TEAMS
  3. Click Join Team, search for your team, and send a request
  4. Can't find it? Ask your coach for the exact team name — or search part of it
  5. Click "Request to Join" to send your request. You and your coach will receive an email notification. Once approved, you'll be ready to start training homework!
Pro Tip: Coaches, turn on "Auto-Accept" and players will automatically join your roster.
📺 Watch: How to Join a Team
🎉

You're All Set!

Once you're on the team, your coach will start assigning training. Let's go! 💪

Questions? Call 803-431-1082 or email megan@anytime-soccer.com

title: Anytime-Soccer-Training-Demo-Survey
Anytime Soccer Training Onboarding Checklist
How to Access Your Homework
content:
How to Access Your Homework

Welcome to Anytime Soccer Training

1

Sign In & Go to Your Dashboard

Once you sign in, click your player profile to access your dashboard.
2

Quick Links (Fastest Way)

Go to Quick Links → My Homework. Select your team name from the dropdown to see the homework your coach has assigned.

When you complete a video, the red X turns into a green check ✓

3

My Teams (Manage Homework)

From your dashboard, go to My Teams → click your team → click Homework. Here you'll see due dates and all assigned folders.
4

Mark Homework as Done

When you finish all videos in a folder, go back to your homework and click Done. You and your coach will receive a confirmation email.

We recommend hiding completed folders to keep things organized.

5

Access via IDP Icon

From your roster, click the red IDP icon to jump directly to the homework your coach has specifically assigned to you.
6

All Programs Area

Since you have access to all content, your My Homework folders are also located in the All Programs area for easy access.
7

Set Your Own Due Dates

Click the calendar icon to set your own personal due date. That homework will then appear in My Training Calendar.

It's never been easier to become more technical and confident on the ball.

If you have any questions, reach out to us. Let's get better together.

803-431-1082  |  megan@anytime-soccer.com

— Neil Crawford, Founder

To check, go to Roster → Pending Invites.

Note: Please let players “request to join your team”. Don’t invite them directly yet.

Note: If a duplicate player appears on the team, follow these steps:

  1. Click Roster
  2. Click the player’s profile name
  3. Copy their email address
  4. Click Leave Team
  5. Invite them again — with auto-accept on, they will automatically appear on the roster

title: Monopoly: Addressing Issues Facing Youth Soccer Ebook
content:
As a soccer dad and volunteer coach, watching the U.S. Men's National Team crash out of the 2024 Copa America inspired me to share my views on the issues facing US youth soccer.

My experiences abroad and chats with soccer experts have given me a fresh perspective on some of these challenges.

I hope this ebook sparks a crucial discussion and helps us find meaningful solutions.

— Neil, Soccer Dad & Founder of Anytime Soccer Training

Monopoly: Discussing Issues Facing US Youth Soccer

A candid look at what's holding back American soccer — and ideas to spark real change from one soccer parent's perspective.

  • Honest takes on pay-to-play culture
  • Insights from international comparisons
  • Ideas for meaningful reform
  • A parent's perspective on the system

We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.

title: The Parent Trainer's Playbook
content:
Fair Warning

These tips aren't politically correct, and many in the mainstream soccer community will disagree. But I trust your judgment to challenge conventional wisdom and find what works for your family.

Just as I'm open with my sons about our journey, I'm open with you here. My goal is to help you navigate your child's soccer path, even if it means questioning the norm.

Whether you're already training your kids or just exploring, this ebook is for you.

— Neil, Soccer Dad & Founder of Anytime Soccer Training

The Parent Trainer's Playbook

20 unconventional tips for raising a competitive soccer player — lessons learned from one soccer dad's journey with his sons.

  • Skip the expensive private trainers
  • Build skills that actually matter
  • Challenge the pay-to-play system
  • Real lessons from a real soccer family

We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.

title: Everything You Need to Know About Player Cards
content:
Through my son’s soccer journey, I’ve learned how crucial understanding player cards are for tournament and league eligibility.

My son has played for multiple teams across states and governing bodies, and I’ve realized the importance of getting the right player cards to access key events.

I’ll share lessons I’ve learned, including a key moment when my son couldn’t play at the Jefferson Cup due to a player card issue—teaching me that different tournaments and governing bodies have specific requirements.

— Neil Crawford, Soccer Dad & Founder of Anytime Soccer Training

Everything You Need to Know About Player Cards

Stay informed, avoid missed opportunities, and ensure your player’s eligibility for tournaments and leagues.

  • Can a player be on multiple teams at once?
  • What happens if you leave a team mid-season?
  • How to get a player card without a current team
  • Understand different governing body requirements

Questions? Email neil@anytime-soccer.com — I’m happy to help!

title: Parent Getting Started Guide - AFC
content:
Parent Getting Started Guide

AFC 2013s and AFC 2014+2016s
Team Code
amfc02212026
Step 1 CREATE YOUR ACCOUNT
  1. Download the Anytime Soccer Training app from the App Store or Google Play.
  2. Open the app and tap "Create Account."
  3. Enter your name, email address, and create a password.
  4. Check your email for a verification link and confirm your account.
  5. Need help? Watch our step-by-step video walkthrough.
    Watch Video
Step 2 ADD PLAYER PROFILE
  1. After logging in, go to "Profiles" or "Players" in the app.
  2. Tap "Add Player" and enter your child's name and details.
  3. Select the appropriate age group and position (if applicable).
  4. Need help? Watch our step-by-step video walkthrough.
    Watch Video
Step 3 JOIN YOUR TEAM
  1. From the app menu, tap "Join a Team" or "Enter Team Code."
  2. Enter the team code: amfc02212026
  3. Select the player profile you want to add to the team and confirm.
  4. Need help? Watch our step-by-step video walkthrough.
    Watch Video
Tip: Can't find your team? Make sure you're entering the code exactly as shown above, including any numbers. If you still have trouble, contact us below.
Bonus ALREADY HAVE AN ACCOUNT?
  1. Log in to the Anytime Soccer Training app with your existing account.
  2. Navigate to "Join a Team" and enter the team code: amfc02212026
  3. Need help applying a team code to your existing account? Watch our walkthrough.
    Watch Video
Tip: Team codes connect your player to the correct team so coaches can assign homework and track progress. Make sure each player profile is joined to the right team.
